offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, stock shortages cause late orders. We provide an inventory control dashboard instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to efficiently manage stock levels and generate timely purchase orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo video
Join community forums for Etsy sellers
try_it: Let users try real-time stock monitoring for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the dashboard
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing stock data
